name: kamae-rs
description: Kamae (構え) - robust server-side Rust design and review skills

interface.shortDescription: Robust Rust domain design and review
interface.longDescription: Design and review server-side Rust domain code with typed states, Result-based errors, validated boundaries, PII-safe patterns, and adversarial review checklists.
defaultPrompt: Use $kamae-rs to refine this Rust domain model.
Use $kamae-rs-review to review this Rust diff.
